title: Portfolio Website
shortDescription: An engineering-focused portfolio showcasing projects, engineering notes, and an AI assistant using React, Vite, and an Express backend.

overview.problem: Traditional portfolios are static and don't reflect engineering depth or system thinking.
overview.solution: Built a dynamic, JSON/Markdown-driven portfolio with a terminal-inspired UI and an AI assistant that understands project and note context.

architecture: React + Vite frontend, Express backend providing AI and content APIs. Content is driven by JSON and Markdown files for easy updates.
challenges: Designing a reusable content pipeline for JSON and Markdown
Rendering engineering notes safely with syntax highlighting
Integrating a lightweight AI assistant without overengineering
learnings: Improved content architecture, markdown rendering, and clean backend integration for AI-assisted interactions.

title: SUMS - Smart University Management System
shortDescription: Role-based university management system focusing on academic workflows and placement processes.

overview.problem: University administrative workflows were fragmented and required role-based access control and transactional integrity.
overview.solution: Designed normalized PostgreSQL schemas and role-based APIs to support Students, Faculty, and Admin workflows reliably.

architecture: Express.js backend, PostgreSQL with normalized schemas, clear role-based routing and validation middleware.
challenges: Designing a BCNF-like normalized schema that supports role-based workflows
Implementing transactional operations and validation across modules
learnings: Database normalization practices, API design for role-based systems, and validation pipelines.

title: GitHub Project Analyzer
shortDescription: A small analytics dashboard that surfaces repository metrics and language distributions using GitHub APIs.

overview.problem: Developers and small teams need quick insights into repository metrics.
overview.solution: Built a simple API-backed dashboard that aggregates GitHub repo stats and visualizes language usage and stars/forks trends.

architecture: Express backend calling GitHub REST APIs, frontend visualizations with Chart.js/EJS for rapid prototyping.
challenges: Designing clean visualizations for small datasets
learnings: API integration patterns, rate limit handling strategies, and data visualization basics.

title: School Management API
shortDescription: REST APIs for managing school data with geolocation-based sorting and basic reporting.

overview.problem: Schools require structured APIs for student, staff, and location-based queries.
overview.solution: Implemented CRUD APIs with geolocation features and documented endpoints for maintainable backend workflows.

architecture: Express.js backend with MySQL, simple reporting endpoints and Postman-documented APIs.
learnings: Practical API design, geolocation querying, and deployment basics.
